title: Gate 7: The Army
description: You are a natural guide who can recognize the right leader for any situation. People look to you to direct them to whoever can lead well. Your influence comes from helping others find the right direction.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 7 (The Army — Leadership through magnetic presence) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You are a natural guide who can recognize the right leader for any situation.
People look to you to direct them to whoever can lead well.
Your influence comes from helping others find the right direction.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 7: The Army — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 7: The Army — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Gate 7: The Army — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 7: The Army — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 7: The Army — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You are a natural guide who can recognize the right leader for any situation. People look to you to direct them to whoever can lead well. Your influence comes from helping others find the right direction.
